title: Illuminated door panel
abstract: A door panel (101, 103) for a motor vehicle comprising an outer skin (502) layer including a light -transmissive soft-touch material. The outer skin also includes a substrate (504) coupled to the outer skin (502) layer. The outer skin (502) also includes a plurality of light (104) sources coupled to the light (104)-transmissive and light (104)-diffusing substrate (504). The outer skin (502) also includes a controller coupled to the plurality of light sources.
claims: Claims What is claimed is: 1. An illuminated door panel (101 , 103) for a motor vehicle comprising: an outer skin (502) layer comprising a light (104)-transmissive soft-touch material; a substrate (504) coupled to the outer skin (502) layer; a plurality of light (104) sources coupled to the light (l04)-transmissive and light (104)- diffusing substrate (504); and a controller coupled to the plurality of light sources. 2. The illuminated door panel of claim 1, wherein the substrate is light transmissive. 3. The illuminated door panel of claim 1 , wherein the substrate is light-diffusing. 4. The illuminated door panel of claim 1, wherein the substrate is opaque and perforated. 5. The illuminated door pane of claim 1, wherein the substrate is perforated and the perforations form a pattern. 6. The illuminated door panel of claim 1 , wherein the substrate is a substantially rigid plastic. 7. The illuminated door panel of claim 1 , wherein the substrate is a flexible plastic. 8. The illuminated door panel of claim 1, wherein the substrate is substantially clear. 9. The illuminated door panel of claim 1 , wherein the substrate is an array of light emitting diodes 10. The illuminated door panel of claim 1 , wherein the controller and plurality' of light sources are powered by the motor vehicle.
